account_executive.description: Filter by account executive. Use 'unassigned' or an integer user id.

account_owner.description: Filter by account owner. Use 'unassigned' or an integer user id.

all_roles_unassigned.description: When true, returns only accounts where CSM, account executive, and account owner are all unset.

csm.description: Filter by CSM. Use 'unassigned' for accounts with no CSM, or an integer user id.

limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

search.description: Case-insensitive substring search across account name and external ID.

tags.description: JSON-encoded array of tag names to filter by, e.g. `["enterprise","priority"]`. Returns accounts that have any of the listed tags.
